name: Practice Coach
description: Adaptive practice-mode consistency HUD: death-hotspot heatmap, persistent reach/fail history, and a difficulty-aware next-goal recommendation.

enable-hud.name: Enable HUD
enable-hud.description: Show the Practice Coach overlay in practice mode.

show-mini-map.name: Show heat-strip mini-map
show-mini-map.description: Draw the green/red consistency strip along the bottom of the screen.

max-attempts.name: Attempts kept per level
max-attempts.description: Rolling history size per level. Lifetime totals are never lost.

min-reach-trust.name: Min reaches to trust a section
min-reach-trust.description: A hotspot is only 'trusted' (acted on) after you reach it this many times.

cold-start-runs.name: Full runs before recommending
cold-start-runs.description: How many full runs to log before the coach starts naming a target.

target-pass-floor.name: Section reliable at pass-rate
target-pass-floor.description: A section counts as 'solid' once its pass-rate is at least this.

recency-lambda.name: Recency weighting
recency-lambda.description: How fast old runs fade from the math. 1.0 = all runs count equally; lower = recent runs dominate, so the coach tracks your current skill.

show-clear-odds.name: Show full-clear odds
show-clear-odds.description: Show an estimated 0-100% clear chance (product of your section pass-rates) to gauge when you're ready for normal mode.
